summary: Good soundboard capture of a funky, psychedelic night at the Shrine with solid performance
review: The show is praised as another awesome, funky and psychedelic evening at the Shrine, worthy of attention despite a stronger previous night. Charlie Miller and his team made the most of the material they had, delivering a clear‑enough soundboard recording that lets the music shine.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review (4★) highlights an enjoyable performance and a decent soundboard capture, yielding an overall rating around four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Engineers did the best they could with the material; generally clear and listenable though no specific high‑fidelity praise is given.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Funky, psychedelic vibe throughout; reviewers describe it as another awesome night at the Shrine.
